incident.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toUpperCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
A newer version of com.android.application than 8.10.1 is available: 9.1.0
A newer version of androidx.fragment:fragment than 1.7.1 is available: 1.8.9
A newer version of androidx.recyclerview:recyclerview than 1.3.2 is available: 1.4.0
A newer version of com.google.code.gson:gson than 2.10.1 is available: 2.11.0
A newer version of androidx.test.ext:junit than 1.1.5 is available: 1.3.0
A newer version of androidx.test.espresso:espresso-core than 3.5.1 is available: 3.7.0
A newer version of androidx.appcompat:appcompat than 1.6.1 is available: 1.7.1
A newer version of com.google.android.material:material than 1.10.0 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of androidx.activity:activity than 1.8.0 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of androidx.constraintlayout:constraintlayout than 2.1.4 is available: 2.2.1
Must use `app:tint` instead of `android:tint`
Must use `app:tint` instead of `android:tint`
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/surface_light` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.MotorcycleTheory`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/surface_light` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.MotorcycleTheory`)
Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
Use version catalog instead

fix-composite.description: Replace with new library catalog declaration for androidx-fragment

incident.message: Use version catalog instead

fix-composite.description: Replace with new library catalog declaration for androidx-recyclerview

incident.message: Use version catalog instead

fix-composite.description: Replace with new library catalog declaration for android-volley

incident.message: Use version catalog instead

fix-composite.description: Replace with new library catalog declaration for google-gson

incident.message: Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.

String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
Hardcoded string "A", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "B", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "C", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "D", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "1", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Nội dung câu hỏi", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "A. Đáp án A", should use `@string` resource

Hardcoded string "0", should use `@string` resource

Hardcoded string "A", should use `@string` resource

Hardcoded string "User #1", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "0/0", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Ngày: 01/01/2026", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Câu #1", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Nội dung câu hỏi...", should use `@string` resource
